description_long: This object is a classic double-action revolver with a robust steel frame and a medium-length barrel. The cylinder is designed to hold six rounds and features visible fluting for weight reduction and style. The grip is made of textured brown wood, ergonomically contoured for a secure hold, and attached with a single screw. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement and protection. The barrel is blued steel, with a front sight post and a clean, unadorned finish. The overall appearance is utilitarian yet refined, suitable for both law enforcement and civilian use.
description: A classic steel revolver with a fluted cylinder, medium barrel, and textured brown wooden grip. The design is robust and functional, with a rounded trigger guard and a blued finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the revolver, including the fluted cylinder, wooden grip, and medium-length barrel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the wooden grip and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cylinder release, grip texture, and the overall symmetry of the revolver.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, barrel opening, and the front sight post.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is crafted from brown wood with a pronounced checkered texture for enhanced traction. It is gently contoured to fit the palm, with a slight palm swell and a rounded butt. The grip is secured by a single visible screw and features no finger grooves or logos, maintaining a classic and functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing robust protection for the trigger. It is smoothly contoured with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or integrated accessories, giving it a traditional and practical look.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length, straight-profiled, and constructed from blued steel. It has a smooth exterior with no visible threading, ports, or compensators. The front sight post is integrated, and the barrel finish is consistent and unmarked.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible slide markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the exterior surfaces of the revolver. The frame and barrel appear clean and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this object does not feature a detachable magazine or magazine base. The grip base is rounded and smooth, with a single screw visible, and lacks any extensions, flares, or finger rests.
